title: helianthus herbaceus
intro: Helianthus herbaceus, also known as the American sunflower or Jerusalem artichoke, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The edible tubers of the Helianthus herbaceus plant have been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and providing a rich source of fiber. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a versatile remedy for a range of health issues.
